MARK BRUEGGEMANN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT THYSSENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORPORATION VIA COURTCALL. CHRISTOPHER CAPALBO APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF KAISER PERMANENTE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/28/13 AND ALL DEADLINES ASSOCIATED WITH THE TRIAL DATE ARE ALSO VACATED. THE COURT ORDERED THIS MATTER BACK TO CASE MANAGEMENT FOR SETTING OF A NEW TRIAL DATE DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL CONDITION AND PLAINTIFF'S UNRESOLVED WORKERS COMPENSATION CLAIM. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 5/8/13 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED.
